events.title: What’s New in Microsoft 365 Copilot | February 2026
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の新機能 | 2026年2月
events.titleEn: What’s New in Microsoft 365 Copilot | February 2026
events.summary: Welcome to the February 2026 edition of What's New in Microsoft 365 Copilot! Every month, we highlight new features and enhancements to keep Microsoft 365 admins up to date with Copilot features that help your users be more productive and efficient in the apps they use every day...
events.summaryJa: Welcome to the February 2026 edition of What's New in Microsoft 365 Copilot! Every month, we highlight new features and enhancements to keep Microsoft 365 admins up to date with Copilot features that help your users be more productive and efficient in the apps they use every day...
